text: 5. ASSIGNMENT/SUBLETTING: Subcontractor cannot assign, transfer, convey, sublet, or otherwise dispose of this subcontract or any part thereof, or his right, title or interest therein, or his power to execute the same, or any proceeds or receivables under this subcontract, without the consent in writing of Contractor. If Subcontractor does, with approval, sublet this subcontract or any part thereof, he shall require that his subcontractor be bound to him and assume toward him all of the obligations and responsibilities that he has assumed toward Contractor.
